text_fr: Assembly  that, if  the economic reconstruction ol devastated areas is  not to be unduly delayed, the International Bank would corne into full effective operation  at  the  earliest  possible  date  so  that, in accordance with the special fonctions laid clown for  the Bank in its articles of Agreement, it may be able, early in 1947, to make the fullest possible contribution  toward  the  needs  of  economic  re› construction;
text_en: Assembly that, if the economic reconstruction ol devastated areas is not to be unduly delayed, the International Bank would horn into full effective operation at the earlier possible date so that, in accordance with the special functions ugly clown for the Bank in its articles of Agreement, it may be feasible, early in 1947, to make the full possible contribution towards the needs of economic re› construction;

items_fr: 4. Recommends that the Economie and Social Council and its Commissions consider undertak› ing as  soon as  possible,  in co-operation with the specialized  agencies  concerned,  a  general  survey of raw material resources needed for the economic reconstruction of devastated areas, with a  view to recommending the adoption of the necessary meas› ures  to increase  and promote production and to facilitate  transportation  of  those  materials  from ·the producing areas to the devastated areas;

Further recommends that,  in order  to give effective  aid  to  the  countries devastated  by  war, the Economie and Social Council, at its next ses› sion, give prompt and favourable consideration to the  establishment  of  an  Economie  Commission for  Europe  and  an  Economie  Commission  for Asia  and  the  Far  East."
items_en: 4. Recommendations that the Economy and Social Council and its Commissions consider undertak› ing as soon as possible, in co-operation with the specialized agencies concerned, a general survey of raw material resources needed for the economic reconstruction of damaged areas, with a view to recommending the adoption of the necessary meas› ures to increase and promote production and to facilitate transport of these materials from ·the producing areas to the devastated areas;

Further recommendations that, in order to give effective aid to the countries damaged by war, the Economy and Social Council, at its next ses›sion, give prompt and desirable consideration to the establishment of an Economy Commission for Europe and an Economy Commission for Asia and the Far East."

text_fr: Fif ty-{tfth  plenary meeting, II December 1946.
text_en: Fif ty-{tfth plenary meeting, II December 1946.

text_fr: 47  ( 1). Report  of  the  Committee  on UNRRA  (United  Nations  Re› lief and Rehabilitation Admin› istration)
text_en: 47 ( 1). Report of the Committee on UNRRA (United Nations Re› lief and Rehabilitation Admin› estration)

text_fr: The General Assembly, at its  twenty-first plen› ary  meeting  on  I  February  1946,  established  a Committee  to  encourage  support  of  UNRRA during the final  stages of its work.
text_en: The General Assembly, at its twenty-first plen› ary meeting on I February 1946, established a Committee to encourage support of UNRRA during the final stages of its work.

text_fr: The General Assembly  has  now received a  re› port  on  the  work  of  the  Committce'  and  has noted with satisfaction the cxtcnt to which Mem› ber Governments have supported the activities of UNRRA and have thus contributed so  substan› tially  to  the  relief  and  rehabilitation  of  those countries which had been dcvastated by the war.
text_en: The General Assembly has now received a re› port on the work of the Committee's and has noted with satisfaction the cxtcnt to which Mem› ber Governments have supported the activities of UNRRA and have these contributed so substan› immediately to the relief and rehabilitation of those countries which had been dcvastated by the war.

text_fr: The General  Assembly  has  learned  from  the report of the Committee that, although cxpected contributions  have  been  rcalized  in  very  large measure,  a  small  proportion  has  not  yct  been made  available,  and  that  the  Chairman  of  the Committee has been requested to draw the atten› tion of the Governments concerncd to  the desir› ability of completing their contributions in order that  UNRRA might reccive  the full  amount re› quired for  the completion of its activities.
text_en: The General Assembly has learned from the report of the Committee that, notwithstanding cxpected contributions have been raised in very large measure, a small proportion has not yct been made available, and that the Chair of the Committee has been asked to draw the attention›tion of the Governments concerned to the desire› ability of completing their contributions in order that UNRRA might recivate the full amount re› which is for the completion of its activities.

text_fr: The General Assembly, therefore,
text_en: The General Assembly, therefore,

text_fr: Warmly thanks the Chairman and members of the  Committee on  UNRRA  for  their efforts m fulfilment  of  the  task  entrusted  to  them;
text_en: Warmly thanks the Chair and members of the Committee on UNRRA for their efforts m fillilment of the task trusted to them;

text_fr: 'Documenu A/94  and  A/94/Add. 1.
text_en: 'Documenu A/94 and A/94/Add. 1.

text_fr: générale estime  que,  si  l'on  veut  éviter 11ue  la reconstruction économique des  régions déva&tées ne  soit  indûment  retardée, la  Banque  interna› tionale  devra  commencer à fonctionner  pleine› ment et effectivement  le  plus  tôt  possible,  de manière à pouvoir,  conformément aux  attribu› tions spéciales que lui assignent les  termes de son statut,  apporter  dès  le  début de  1947,  la  plus large  contribution  possible  pour  satisfaire  les besoim de la reconstruction économique;
text_en: In order to avoid the economic reconstruction of the deprived regions, the International Bank will have to start operating fully and effectively as soon as possible in order to be able, in accordance with the special allocations assigned to it by the terms of its statute, to make the widest possible contribution from the beginning of 1947 in order to satisfy the needs of economic reconstruction;

items_fr: 4. Recommande que le  Conseil économique et social et ses  Commission~ l'nvisagent d'entrepren› dre aussitôt que possible,  en coopération avec les institutions spécialisées, une enquête générale sur les  ressources  en  matières  premières nécessaires à la reconstruction économique des régions dévas› tées, en vue de recommander l'adoption des mesu› res  propres à augmenter et à développer la pro› duction  ainsi  qu'à faciliter  le  transport  de  ces matières premières des  régions productrices  vers les  zones  dévastées;

5. Recommande, en outre, que, pour apporter une aide efficace aux pays dévastés par la guerre, le  Conseil  économique et  social,  à  sa  prochaine session, procède sans délai :1  un examl'n favorable de la question de la création d'une Commission économique pour l'Europe et d'une Commission économique pour l'Asie et !'Extrême-Orient.
items_en: 4. Recommends that the Economic and Social Council and its Commission undertake as soon as possible, in cooperation with the specialized agencies, a general survey of the raw material resources necessary for the economic reconstruction of the devastated regions, with a view to recommending the adoption of measures to increase and develop production and to facilitate the transport of such raw materials from the producing regions to the devastated areas;

5. Further recommends that, in order to provide effective assistance to war-stricken countries, the Economic and Social Council, at its next session, proceed without delay:1 a favourable review of the question of the establishment of an Economic Commission for Europe and an Economic Commission for Asia and the Far East.

text_fr: Cinquante-cinquième séance plénière, le  11  décembre 1946.
text_en: Fifty-fifth plenary meeting, 11 December 1946.

text_fr: 47 (1). Rapport du Comitédel'UNRRA ( United  Nations  Relief  and Rehabilitation Administration)
text_en: 47 (1). Report of the United Nations Relief and Rehabilitation Administration (UNRRA) Committee

text_fr: L'Assemblée générale, au cours de sa  vingt  et unième  séance plénière, le  1"  février  1~146,  a constitué un  Comité chargé de  faciliter  l'o:uvre de l'UNRRA au cours des derniers  mois de son existence.
text_en: The General Assembly, at its twenty-first plenary meeting, on 1 February 1~146, established a Committee to facilitate the work of UNRRA in the last few months of its existence.

text_fr: L'Assemblée générale est  maintenant  en  pos› session  d'un rapport sur les  travaux du Comité' et constate avec satisfaction l'importance de l'aide que  les  Gouvernements  des  Etats  Membres  ont apportée à l'UNRRA,  contribuant  ainsi  de manière considérable à  fournir  des  secours  aux pays  dévastés par  la  guerre  et à faciliter  leur reconstruction.
text_en: The General Assembly is now in session for a report on the work of the Committee' and notes with satisfaction the importance of the assistance that the Governments of Member States have provided to UNRRA, thus making a significant contribution to the provision of relief and reconstruction to war-stricken countries.

items_fr: L' AssCin bléc générale, par le rapport du Comité, a  pu  voir  que,  si  une  très  grande  partie  des contributions  attendues  ont été versées, il  reste encore une petite partie qui n'a pas été versée, et que le  Président du Comité a  été invité à attirer l'atte;Hion  des  gouvernements  intéressés sur  le fait  qu'il  serait à désirer qu'ils complètent le versl'ml'nt.  de  leurs  contributions  en  vue  de permcttrl' à J'UNRRA de  réunir le  total  des fonds indispensables  à l'achèvement  de ses trav.aux.
items_en: The General AssCin, in the Committee's report, was able to see that, although a very large part of the expected contributions had been made, there was still a small part that had not been paid, and that the Chairman of the Committee had been invited to draw attention to the fact that it would be desirable for the Governments concerned to supplement their contributions to UNRRA with a view to raising the total of the funds necessary for the completion of their work.

text_fr: L'Assemblée générale, en  conséquence,
text_en: The General Assembly, accordingly,

text_fr: Remercie vivement le  Président et les membres du Comité de !'UN.RRA pour les  efforts  qu'ils ont  fournis  en s'acquittant de la  tâche qui  leur avait été confiée;
text_en: Expresses its deep appreciation to the Chairman and the members of the UN.RRA Committee for their efforts in carrying out the task entrusted to them;

text_fr: 48 (IJ. Besoins  d'assistance après la cessation de l'UNRRA  (United Nations Relief and Rehabilita› tion  Administration)
text_en: 48 (IJ. United Nations Relief and Rehabilitation Administration)

text_fr: L'Assemblée générale,
text_en: The General Assembly,

text_fr: Prenant  acte <le la  résolution  No  100  du Conseil <le  l'UNRRA en date du 16  août 1946, et de  la  résolution connexe  adoptée par  le  Conseil économique et social  le 3  octobre  1946;
text_en: Taking note of Council resolution No. 100 of 16 August 1946, and the related resolution adopted by the Economic and Social Council on 3 October 1946;

text_fr: Reromzaissant que certains pays auront besoin, en  1917,  d'une assistance  financière pour couvrir leurs  importations  de  denrées alimentaires  et autres principaux produits de première nécessité;
text_en: Remediing that some countries would need financial assistance in 1917 to cover their imports of foodstuffs and other essential goods;

text_fr: Prenant  acte de  ce  que  les  organisations  in› ternationales et autres institutions  publiques ou priv{·cs  auxquelles  on  peut  faire  appel à cette fin,  ne  pourront  peut-être pas,  dans  tous les cas, satisfaire  complètement ces  besoins  d'assistance;
text_en: Taking note of the fact that international organizations and other public or private institutions which can be used for this purpose may not in all cases be able to fully meet these needs for assistance;

text_fr: nno11nals.rn11t que certains pays,  s'ils ne reçoi› vent pas celle assistance, se  trouveront exposés au cours  de  l'hiver, du  printemps  et  au  début de ! 'été <le  l'année prochaine, à la famine, aux priva› tion, et aux souffrances;
text_en: n°11nals.rn11t that some countries, if they do not receive the assistance, will be exposed during the winter, spring and early summer to famine, deprivation and suffering next year;

text_fr: 1'1 numt acte de l'urgente nécessité de pourvoir rapidement à cette assistancP.  complémentaire, et llu  fait  que les  Etats Membres des Nations Unies ,(·  ,,)111 d{·clarés disposés à  jouer leur rôle dans la 1cal1,ation de c-cttc  fin;
text_en: 1st Act of the urgent need to provide rapid assistance to this supplementary assistance, and it follows that the Member States of the United Nations,111 declared ready to play their part in the final decision-making process;

text_fr: Uno111zals.1a11t qu'il  est  souhaitable  de  faire face à ces  besoins  sans  gaspillage  d'efforts résul› Ltnt  de lloublc emploi;
text_en: Uno111zals.1a11t that it is desirable to meet these needs without wasting any effort as a result› Ltnt of lloublc employment;

text_fr: Co11sidt'rn11l que l'un des buts de l'Organisation des  Nations  Unies  est  d'être un  centre oø s'harn10nisent  les  efforts  des  nations  vers  leurs  fins communes, dont l'une est  de réaliser la coopéra› tion  internationale  en  résolvant les  problèmes d'ordre économique et humanitaire;
text_en: It is important that the United Nations should be a centre for the efforts of nations towards their common ends, one of which is to achieve international cooperation in solving economic and humanitarian problems;

text_fr: Réa{]î111wnt le  principe selon lequel les secours ne doi\ çnt être utilisés à  aucun moment comme arme politi<p1c et scion lequel aucune discrimina› tion du point de vue racial, religieux ou politique ne  doit  être exercée dans  la  distribution  des  se› cours:
text_en: The principle that aid must not be used at any time as a political weapon and that no racial, religious or political discrimination must be exercised in the distribution of courses:

items_fr: 1. Cree un Comité technique spécial qui sera chargé:
items_en: 1. Establish an Ad Hoc Technical Committee to:

text_fr: a)  D'étudier les  besoins  minima  d'importa› tion,  en  cc  qui  concerne  les  produits  de  pre› mière nécessilé, notamment les denrées alimen› taires  et  les  fournitures  destinées à la  produc› tion agricole des pays qui, de l'avis du Comité, peuvent avoir besoin d'être aidés afin  d'éviter les  soulfranccs ou la régression économique qui compromet  leur  approvisionnement  en  pro› <lui ts de première nécessité;
text_en: (a) to study the minimum import requirements for necessary raw materials, in particular foodstuffs and supplies for agricultural production in countries which, in the Committee's view, may need to be assisted in order to avoid excessive or economic regression which jeopardizes their supply of raw materials;
